gt_sql: SELECT T1.name, T1.year FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Michael' AND T3.surname = 'Schumacher' ORDER BY T2.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
  AND res.milliseconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
question: State the race and year of race in which Michael Schumacher had his fastest lap.
